steps.title: Identify the text's organizing pattern
steps.content: The passage repeatedly describes what each institution focuses on: MOLAA is “dedicated to modern and contemporary art by Latin American artists and Latino artists in the United States,” and Casa de Rosado “focuses on the arts and cultures of Latino communities in Michigan.”

steps.title: Select the matching purpose
steps.content:
C correctly identifies the purpose as presenting information about two institutions, including their areas of focus.

The other three either invent information absent from the passage, discuss mechanics not mentioned, or misidentify what's being compared.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
